product_description: Ứng dụng nhận diện đồng xu qua camera, hiển thị thông tin đồng xu và khoảng giá trị tham khảo. Ứng dụng không cung cấp định giá chính thức và không đảm bảo giá bán thực tế.
brief:
Tạo video quảng cáo cinematic storytelling dài khoảng 35 giây.

NHÂN VẬT:
Nam người Việt/Châu Á, 55 tuổi, đội mũ phớt, mặc trang phục giản dị. Giữ nguyên khuôn mặt, tuổi, mũ, trang phục và vóc dáng trong tất cả scene.

BỐI CẢNH:
Chợ trời đông đúc, quầy hàng cũ với bàn gỗ và khay đồng xu. Giữ nhất quán bố cục quầy hàng, ánh sáng, đạo cụ và vị trí người bán.

KỊCH BẢN:

0-5s:
Người đàn ông cầm một đồng xu lạ, quan sát đồng xu, liếc nhìn người bán đang đưa ra giá rồi kín đáo quay mặt sang hướng khác.

Voiceover tiếng Tây Ban Nha, giữ nguyên:
“En el mercadillo siempre hay tesoros, pero no quiero que me engañen.”

Overlay thêm ở hậu kỳ:
“🔍 ¿Buscando tesoros?”

5-15s:
Ông kín đáo lấy điện thoại bên dưới mép bàn, mở Coin Identifier và nhanh chóng chuẩn bị quét đồng xu. Khi hiển thị ứng dụng, sử dụng đúng từng ảnh giao diện được upload. Không kết hợp nhiều màn hình app vào cùng một keyframe.

Voiceover tiếng Tây Ban Nha, giữ nguyên:
“Por eso uso Coin Identifier discretamente. Es gratis y súper rápida.”

Overlay thêm ở hậu kỳ:
“⚡ Súper rápida y discreta”

15-25s:
Ứng dụng hiển thị thông tin đồng xu và một khoảng giá trị tham khảo cao hơn giá người bán đưa ra. Không khẳng định đây là giá bán hoặc định giá chính thức. Sau khi đọc kết quả, người đàn ông nhếch mép cười kín đáo.

Voiceover tiếng Tây Ban Nha, giữ nguyên:
“Me dio un precio de referencia alto, ¡la compraré por unos centavos!”

Overlay thêm ở hậu kỳ:
“💰 ¡Una ganga!”

25-35s:
Người đàn ông trả tiền, nhận đồng xu, bỏ nó vào túi rồi nhìn và nháy mắt với camera.

Voiceover tiếng Tây Ban Nha, giữ nguyên:
“Sé más listo en tus compras. Descarga la app gratis aquí.”

Overlay thêm ở hậu kỳ:
“👇 Sé más listo”

YÊU CẦU SẢN XUẤT:
- Mỗi scene chỉ có một hành động hoặc thay đổi trạng thái chính.
- Mỗi scene có một keyframe riêng.
- Scene sau phải tiếp nối tư thế, hướng nhìn, vị trí điện thoại, đồng xu và trạng thái hành động của scene trước.
- Mỗi keyframe app chỉ sử dụng đúng một screen reference phù hợp.
- Không tự thiết kế lại giao diện, chữ, màu sắc, logo hoặc thông tin sản phẩm.
- Chỉ sử dụng chuyển động camera nhẹ và có chủ đích.
- Giữ ánh sáng và không khí chợ trời nhất quán.
- Không tạo overlay, subtitle, CTA hoặc giá trị tiền trực tiếp trong video; thêm chúng ở hậu kỳ.
- Không tuyên bố định giá chính xác, lợi nhuận đảm bảo hoặc giá bán chắc chắn.

storySpine.logline:
Tạo video quảng cáo cinematic storytelling dài khoảng 35 giây.

NHÂN VẬT:
Nam người Việt/Châu Á, 55 tuổi, đội mũ phớt, mặc trang phục giản dị. Giữ nguyên khuôn mặt, tuổi, mũ, trang phục và vóc dáng trong tất cả scene.

BỐI CẢNH:
Chợ trời đông đúc, quầy hàng cũ với bàn gỗ và khay đồng xu. Giữ nhất quán bố cục quầy hàng, ánh sáng, đạo cụ và vị trí người bán.

KỊCH BẢN:

0-5s:
Người đàn ông cầm một đồng xu lạ, quan sát đồng xu, liếc nhìn người bán đang đưa ra giá rồi kín đáo quay mặt sang hướng khác.

Voiceover tiếng Tây Ban Nha, giữ nguyên:
“En el mercadillo siempre hay tesoros, pero no quiero que me engañen.”

Overlay thêm ở hậu kỳ:
“🔍 ¿Buscando tesoros?”

5-15s:
Ông kín đáo lấy điện thoại bên dưới mép bàn, mở Coin Identifier và nhanh chóng chuẩn bị quét đồng xu. Khi hiển thị ứng dụng, sử dụng đúng từng ảnh giao diện được upload. Không kết hợp nhiều màn hình app vào cùng một keyframe.

Voiceover tiếng Tây Ban Nha, giữ nguyên:
“Por eso uso Coin Identifier discretamente. Es gratis y súper rápida.”

Overlay thêm ở hậu kỳ:
“⚡ Súper rápida y discreta”

15-25s:
Ứng dụng hiển thị thông tin đồng xu và một khoảng giá trị tham khảo cao hơn giá người bán đưa ra. Không khẳng định đây là giá bán hoặc định giá chính thức. Sau khi đọc kết quả, người đàn ông nhếch mép cười kín đáo.

Voiceover tiếng Tây Ban Nha, giữ nguyên:
“Me dio un precio de referencia alto, ¡la compraré por unos centavos!”

Overlay thêm ở hậu kỳ:
“💰 ¡Una ganga!”

25-35s:
Người đàn ông trả tiền, nhận đồng xu, bỏ nó vào túi rồi nhìn và nháy mắt với camera.

Voiceover tiếng Tây Ban Nha, giữ nguyên:
“Sé más listo en tus compras. Descarga la app gratis aquí.”

Overlay thêm ở hậu kỳ:
“👇 Sé más listo”

YÊU CẦU SẢN XUẤT:
- Mỗi scene chỉ có một hành động hoặc thay đổi trạng thái chính.
- Mỗi scene có một keyframe riêng.
- Scene sau phải tiếp nối tư thế, hướng nhìn, vị trí điện thoại, đồng xu và trạng thái hành động của scene trước.
- Mỗi keyframe app chỉ sử dụng đúng một screen reference phù hợp.
- Không tự thiết kế lại giao diện, chữ, màu sắc, logo hoặc thông tin sản phẩm.
- Chỉ sử dụng chuyển động camera nhẹ và có chủ đích.
- Giữ ánh sáng và không khí chợ trời nhất quán.
- Không tạo overlay, subtitle, CTA hoặc giá trị tiền trực tiếp trong video; thêm chúng ở hậu kỳ.
- Không tuyên bố định giá chính xác, lợi nhuận đảm bảo hoặc giá bán chắc chắn.

product_name: Ngày Tôi Bắt Quả Tang Chồng Ngoại Tình
product_description:
Create a realistic cinematic storytelling video in Vietnamese.

The entire narration and all spoken dialogue must be in natural Vietnamese with an authentic Vietnamese female voice.

The story is told in first person by a wife who shares the most unforgettable day of her life when she caught her husband cheating.

She begins by explaining that her husband suddenly became distant, constantly hid his phone, and frequently claimed he had to work late. Instead of confronting him immediately, she quietly gathered evidence over the course of two weeks.

One evening, after her husband said he was meeting a client, she secretly followed him to a shopping mall. She waited outside until she saw him walking out while holding hands with another woman.

She calmly walked toward them and asked, "Em là ai?". Her husband froze and desperately tried to explain that the woman was only a coworker. The wife then showed screenshots of text messages, photos, and location history proving he had been lying. The younger woman was shocked after discovering that the husband had lied to both of them.

The husband repeatedly apologized and begged for another chance, but the wife refused. She looked directly at him and said, "Điều làm tôi đau nhất không phải là anh hết yêu, mà là anh đã nói dối tôi hết lần này đến lần khác."

The story ends with the wife walking away confidently without looking back. She explains that leaving the relationship was painful, but it was the moment she finally respected herself again.

Style: realistic, emotional, cinematic, dramatic facial expressions, natural acting, modern shopping mall, warm color grading, handheld camera, close-up shots, high-quality storytelling suitable for TikTok, Facebook Reels, and YouTube Shorts.

Voice language: Vietnamese.
Narration: Vietnamese female voice.
Dialogue: 100% Vietnamese.

scenes.title: The Change Begins
scenes.sceneGoal: Establish the wife's initial suspicion and the husband's changed behavior, setting the stage for the unfolding drama.

direction.valueShift: From comfortable normalcy to growing unease and suspicion.
direction.feltIntent: To make the viewer feel the wife's quiet apprehension and the subtle shift in her relationship.
direction.lighting: Soft, slightly muted lighting in a home setting, reflecting the quiet tension.
direction.atmosphere: Subtle sounds of a quiet home, perhaps a distant TV or street noise. A sense of quiet observation.
direction.performanceSubtext: The wife's eyes follow her husband, a flicker of concern and suspicion in her gaze, masked by a facade of normalcy.

scenes.visualAction: The wife sits on a sofa, subtly observing her husband across the room. He is engrossed in his phone, quickly hiding it or turning it away when she glances. He then stands, grabs his bag, and makes an excuse about working late, avoiding eye contact as he leaves.
scenes.productMoment: No product moment.
scenes.characterAction: The wife (Linh) sits, initially relaxed, then her expression subtly shifts to a thoughtful, slightly worried look as she watches her husband. Her hands might fidget slightly. She maintains a poker face as he speaks, but her eyes betray her internal conflict.
scenes.locationUse: Inside a modern, comfortable living room. Camera focuses on the wife's perspective, then a medium shot of the husband, then back to a close-up on the wife.

camera.movement: Slow, subtle pan from wife to husband, then a slight push-in on wife's face.
camera.composition: Framing emphasizes the emotional distance between them and the wife's internal state.
alternatives: over-the-shoulder shot of husband's phone screen
close-up on wife's hands

scenes.ambientAudio: Subtle sounds of a home, distant city hum, husband's footsteps, phone vibrations.

scenes.sceneGoal: Visually depict the wife's methodical process of gathering evidence over two weeks, building tension and showing her resolve.

direction.valueShift: From passive observation to active investigation and quiet determination.
direction.feltIntent: To convey the wife's quiet suffering and her methodical, painful resolve to uncover the truth.
direction.lighting: Slightly dimmer, more intimate lighting, suggesting secrecy and late-night activity.
direction.atmosphere: Quiet, almost silent, with only the subtle sounds of phone interaction. Emphasize the solitude of her investigation.
direction.performanceSubtext: The wife's focused gaze and careful movements as she scrolls through the phone, a mix of dread and grim determination on her face.

scenes.visualAction: Close-up on the wife's hands as she scrolls through her husband's phone (or her own phone showing shared location/messages), revealing suspicious text messages, photos, and location history. Her face, in a tight close-up, shows a mix of sadness and confirmation of her fears. She takes screenshots.

scenes.locationUse: A dimly lit bedroom or study, emphasizing privacy and the solitary nature of her task. Camera is very close to the wife and the phone.

camera.movement: Static shot, then a very slow push-in on her face.
camera.composition: Focus entirely on the phone screen and the wife's emotional reaction.
alternatives: over-the-shoulder shot of phone screen
tight shot on her tearful eye

scenes.title: The Secret Follow
scenes.sceneGoal: Show the wife secretly following her husband to the shopping mall, building suspense for the inevitable confrontation.

direction.valueShift: From internal investigation to external pursuit and heightened tension.
direction.feltIntent: To make the viewer feel the wife's anxious anticipation and the stealth of her actions.
direction.lighting: Evening lighting, with city lights and mall glow, creating a slightly dramatic, shadowy feel.
direction.atmosphere: Sounds of city traffic and distant mall chatter. A sense of urgency and quiet pursuit.
direction.performanceSubtext: The wife's focused, intense gaze, her body language conveying a mix of fear and resolve as she tails her husband.

scenes.visualAction: The wife, dressed discreetly, is seen from behind, walking purposefully through a parking lot or street towards a modern shopping mall entrance. She glances around cautiously, then spots her husband's car or him entering the mall from a distance. She quickens her pace, maintaining a safe distance.

camera.movement: Tracking shot following the wife from behind, then a slight pan to reveal the mall entrance.

scenes.title: Walking Away with Self-Respect
scenes.sceneGoal: Show the wife walking away confidently, symbolizing her newfound self-respect and the end of the painful chapter.

direction.valueShift: From confrontation and pain to liberation and self-respect.
direction.feltIntent: To make the viewer feel a sense of empowerment, closure, and admiration for the wife's strength.

storySpine.logline: A wife recounts the unforgettable day she confronted her cheating husband at a shopping mall, leading to a painful but empowering separation.
storySpine.storyPromise: The audience will witness a raw, emotional journey of betrayal, confrontation, and ultimate self-respect, told through a cinematic lens.
storySpine.objective: To create a realistic, emotionally resonant short video that captures the dramatic turning point in a woman's life when she reclaims her self-worth after betrayal.
storySpine.initialCondition: A wife observes her husband's suspicious behavior, feeling a growing sense of dread and suspicion.
storySpine.finalOutcome: The wife walks away from her husband with newfound confidence and self-respect, having made a difficult but necessary choice.

worldBible.locationLock: The modern shopping mall location must maintain its contemporary architecture, warm ambient lighting, and general layout as seen in the reference image. Recurring elements like glass facades, polished floors, and specific storefront designs should remain consistent, viewed from various angles (same, side, opposite).
worldBible.productLock: No specific product or app to lock. Focus on character, location, and storytelling elements.
worldBible.visualGrammar: Predominantly handheld camera work, favoring close-up shots to capture raw emotions and dramatic facial expressions. Eye-level perspectives for intimacy, with occasional wider shots to establish the modern shopping mall setting. Composition emphasizes the primary character's perspective and emotional state.
worldBible.lightingContinuity: Warm color grading throughout, reflecting the emotional intensity and creating a cinematic mood. Lighting will shift from slightly subdued and suspicious in early scenes to brighter, more direct lighting during the confrontation, and finally to a confident, slightly backlit look as the wife walks away.
worldBible.atmosphereContinuity: Subtle ambient sounds of a home environment initially, transitioning to the muffled, distant sounds of a bustling shopping mall. Emotional silence or sparse, dramatic music will underscore key moments of confrontation and decision. The overall atmosphere will be tense, then dramatic, then empowering.

storySpine.logline: An older person discovers a hidden fortune in old coins using a simple mobile app.
storySpine.storyPromise: You can easily find out if your old coins are worth a lot of money.
storySpine.objective: Drive app installs for Coin Identifier by showcasing its ease of use and potential for financial discovery.
storySpine.initialCondition: An old, dusty box of seemingly worthless coins.
storySpine.finalOutcome: The actor is delighted, having discovered significant value, and encourages others to use the app.
storySpine.tone: UGC, natural, realistic, surprising, hopeful, easy-to-understand

worldBible.characterLock: The same older man, with his specific facial features, hair, and casual attire.
worldBible.locationLock: The same cozy study corner with its fixed wooden table, armchair, bookshelf layout, and natural light direction from the left. Props on the table (like the old box) should maintain their relative positions.
worldBible.productLock: Preserve the exact UI layout, text, colors, and functionality of the Coin Identifier app as shown in the provided references.
worldBible.visualGrammar: Eye-level shots, close-ups for product interaction, warm and natural lighting. Focus on clear action and legible app UI.
worldBible.lightingContinuity: Soft, warm, natural light coming from a window or overhead, consistent across scenes.
worldBible.atmosphereContinuity: Quiet home environment, subtle ambient sounds, clear voiceover.
antiDriftRules: Re-anchor every scene from canonical character, location, and product references.
Use generated output only as an observed handoff, never as the sole identity source.
Do not silently change face, wardrobe, product geometry, location layout, or exact reference names.

surfaceProfile.imageInputPolicy: one selected keyframe as the visual anchor
surfaceProfile.overlayPolicy: render subtitles, CTA, and precise text in post-production
surfaceProfile.continuityPolicy: canonical re-anchor per scene; accepted take state informs the next shot
limitations: Face and object consistency can be improved but cannot be guaranteed permanently by orchestration alone.
Exact UI and small readable text should come from a locked keyframe or post-production, not free generation.
Separate generated clips need final music, subtitle, and transition assembly in an editor.

claimsToAvoid: Exaggerated claims about guaranteed high value
Claims about selling coins directly through the app
rewriteRules: Replace unlicensed celebrity or protected character imitation with an original generic character.
Do not clone a private person's face or voice without authorization.
Move precise legal copy, prices, disclaimers, and logos to approved keyframes or post-production.

qualityStrategy.oneVariableRule: Change one prompt clause, seed, mode, or reference per retake.
qualityStrategy.rewriteThreshold: Rewrite after the same flaw appears in two takes.
qualityStrategy.acceptanceRule: Only accepted observed footage updates canon; rejected footage never becomes a continuation source.
